voice_observations.caption_text:
Ounass Presents: Sablyn’s founder, Sable Banoun, as she styles her signature silhouettes in her own way, spotlighting the fluid lines, refined textures, and modern femininity that define the brand. Discover her brand, now on Ounass.
أُناس تقدّم: مؤسسة سابلين، سابل بانون، حيث تنسّق القصّات التي تشتهر بها ماركتها بأسلوبها الخاص، وتسلّط الضوء على الانسيابية، النقشات الفاخرة والأنوثة العصرية التي تعكس هويّة الماركة. اكتشفي ماركتها، الآن على أُناس.
voice_observations.hook_text: Ounass Presents: Sablyn’s founder, Sable Banoun
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi, my name is Sable. I'm the founder and creative director of Sablein. I started Sablein in 2017 in Los Angeles. Born and raised in LA, I built the brand around one idea. When a woman is comfortable, she feels confident. Women have so much going on, the last thing they need to worry about is what they're gonna wear. So I really created something that was just easy, effortless, and elevated. Everything's monochromatic, so it's super easy when you're getting dressed. You can obviously buy one piece, but normally for an outfit, you buy two to three pieces, go from day to night. In the day, you can throw it on with a sneaker. Nighttime, put a heel on. If you're cold, throw on a little cashmere sweater. Everything always goes back to each other. At Sablein, we use the highest quality fabrics. We use 100% cashmere, 100% silk. The design process at Sablein is always revolving around the cashmere. We take the cashmere, we dye the color we like, and then we take everything else after that, the silk, the cotton, the denim, and everything is meant to go based on the cashmere sweater. The brand really embodies LA. It has that ease to it. So I really wanted to mix the effortlessness and the polished look. So what I have on now is our brook pant. It's our classic silk pleated pant. I wear it a little dressier with a heel, but if I wanted to have a more casual look, I would throw on this cotton cashmere sweater with some sneakers and be good to go. When we do our pops of color, we make them feel easy, almost like you're wearing a neutral. If you ask me what I like about my brand, it's the ease and the elegance that comes out when you wear it. We've recently launched in the UAE, and we're so excited for you to discover us, Anunos. Happy shopping.
